arts.sum: Liverpool really wanted to sign Martin Zubimendi in the summer. Liverpool chased Zubimendi in the summer, and they were close to signing him at one...

arts.ttl: Dream Arsenal end to the January transfer window including Sesko and Zubimendi
arts.sum: Sociedad want to keep the player until the summer, but if Arsenal could push through a deal before the January transfer window closes, it will give them a huge lift for the second half of the season. But what does the perfect end to the January transfer window look like for Arsenal ?

arts.ttl: Unai Emery responds to Gary Neville's X-rated Arsenal rant as Austin MacPhee mentioned
arts.sum: Unai Emery has revealed how thoroughly Aston Villa prepare for set-pieces, with a team meeting and at least one session on the grass dedicated to them before a match. I shared my experience with him and we held lots of meetings about how we should prepare the set-pieces for the players.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Aston Villa – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal battle it out against Aston Villa and former boss Unai Emery this evening. The Gunners prevailed over their fierce rivals Tottenham during the week with a 2-1 victory at the Emirates Stadium. Another north London derby, another big moment from Gabi ⚡️ pic.twitter.com/tfrgVCnbGy — Arsenal (@Arsenal) January 17, 2025 Gabriel Jesus isn’t expected to […] The post Arsenal vs Aston Villa – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Report: Edu Gaspar has 'personally' told Arsenal's Premier League rivals to sign 'excellent' Gunners talent
Aston Villa transfer state of play: Medical booked, Loic Bade truth, Diego Carlos and more exits
arts.sum: Aston Villa are closing in on their second signing of the winter transfer window as business begins to ramp up ahead of the deadline in just over two weeks' time. Monchi signed Bade on loan for Sevilla in January 2023, before the France international then joined the Spanish side permanently the following summer.

arts.ttl: Brentford vs. Liverpool: Arne Slot faces Premier League title test as Arsenal close gap
arts.sum: Liverpool's match against Brentford away from home in the Premier League on Saturday afternoon is a real test of their title credentials.

arts.ttl: Trossard: Arsenal need to be perfect to win the Premier League this season
arts.sum: Arsenal forward Leandro Trossard has admitted his side will need to be perfect in their pursuit of the Premier League title this season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Tottenham watch on as Randal Kolo Muani loan falls into doubt despite confirmation
arts.sum: Randal Kolo Muani's expected loan move to Juventus has been thrown into doubt in bizarre circumstances, though it is not a situation that is expected to put Arsenal or Tottenham Hotspur on high alert. PSG have discovered they have already reached the maximum six senior players they are allowed to have loaned out at any one given time, therefore are scrambling to resolve the issue before Kolo Muani's move can be confirmed.
